name: three-d-carousel-demo
visual_summary: A 3D photo carousel component that can be used in a webpage to display a series of 3D images. The carousel can be used when the goal is to create an engaging experience for users by showcasing products or content in a visually appealing and interactive way. The component is likely to be used in marketing or sales contexts.
